headline: Micron soars 16% on blowout earnings
detail: Micron's blockbuster quarter signals strong memory demand and gives the whole chip sector a short-term confidence boost. This is the best near-term catalyst for SMH and could give AVGO a dead-cat bounce — but watch whether it holds into the close before reading too much into it.

headline: Apple drops 6% on MacBook and iPad price hikes from memory crunch
detail: Apple is raising prices because memory costs are crushing margins — that's a direct negative signal for chip suppliers and the broader semis chain. AVGO has meaningful Apple exposure, so this adds real fundamental pressure on top of your already painful 12.9% loss there.

headline: Iran tightens grip on Strait of Hormuz, oil prices rise
detail: Higher oil prices feed into broader inflation fears, which can pressure growth and tech valuations — the exact names you're concentrated in. On margin, a macro risk-off move hits your book harder than most; keep an eye on whether this escalates.

headline: Bond ETF flows surge in yield hunt
detail: Big rotation into bonds signals some institutional money is quietly de-risking from equities. That's a quiet warning sign for high-multiple tech names like PLTR and CRWD, which need risk appetite to stay elevated to hold their valuations.
